programs.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programs.sub_title: The Cops, The Fugitive, The Nurse, And Her Lover
programs.desc: When Lanell Barsock is found murdered, it seems obvious to all that her boyfriend did it; when the forensic evidence comes in, investigators are astonished to learn they've arrested the wrong person.

programs.title: Flashpoint
programs.desc: A woman kidnaps another woman and holds her hostage; when the situation escalates quickly, team members question how things was handled.

programs.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programs.desc: This true-crime series tells the chilling tales of those most unfortunate souls who unwittingly take up residence within a stone's throw of a psycho or killer.
